name: Close Third-Person Limited with Exclusive Protagonist Anchor
narrative_summary: POV architecture anchoring exclusively to protagonist consciousness; reader accesses internal reasoning, strategic calculations, and self-justifications without editorial distance. Supporting characters rendered through evaluative observation with internal states accessible only through dialogue and observable tells.

content_json.character_asymmetry: supporting characters observed externally; internal states through dialogue and physiological tells only
content_json.strategic_intrusion: occasional privileged access to female characters during intimate vulnerability moments creates asymmetric reader intimacy
content_json.ironic_distance: dramatic irony maintained through protagonist foreknowledge while other characters operate with incomplete information

name: Deliberate Sentence Rhythm Alternation
narrative_summary: Sentence rhythm varies deliberately between staccato fragments for tension/action beats and extended flowing passages for exposition, strategic analysis, and sensory description. Intimate scenes employ rhythmic phrasing mirroring physical cadence.

content_json.tension_fragments: short declarative sentences for action beats, shock moments, tension spikes
content_json.contemplative_flow: longer compound-complex sentences for strategic analysis, internal reflection, sensory description
content_json.rhythmic_mirroring: intimate sequences use phrasing cadence that mirrors physical escalation
content_json.dialogue_pacing: rapid-fire short turns during verbal sparring contrasted against extended internal monologue blocks
content_json.emotional_beats: short sentences mark significant realizations, emotional pivots, dramatic revelations

name: Subtext-Driven Dialogue with Register Distinction
narrative_summary: Dialogue system prioritizing subtext where surface meaning differs from underlying communication. Characters speak around central issues requiring reader inference. Formal court registers contrast with intimate registers marking relationship progression.

content_json.subtext_priority: surface meaning differs from underlying communication; reader inference required
content_json.register_distinction: formal court registers contrast with intimate registers marking relationship and power dynamics
content_json.deflection_pattern: professional topics serve as conversational refuge when emotional discussion uncomfortable
content_json.attribution_minimization: dialogue-heavy scenes rely on context rather than repeated speech tags
content_json.implication_communication: strategic ambiguity preserves deniability; characters communicate through what is NOT said
content_json.euphemism_employment: sexual content uses implication rather than explicit terminology

name: Sensory-First Description with Physiological Externalization
narrative_summary: Description strategy prioritizing tactile and olfactory details over visual during intimate scenes. Emotional states conveyed through body responses (blushing, sweating, trembling, posture changes, eye contact breaks) rather than direct statement.

content_json.sensory_priority: tactile and olfactory details prioritized over visual during intimate scenes; temperature, warmth, texture, breath
content_json.physiological_externalization: emotional states conveyed through body responses rather than direct statement
content_json.evaluative_filter: description filtered through protagonist desire and strategic assessment
content_json.environment_minimalism: environmental description sparse unless serving power metaphor or status signaling
content_json.action_over_catalog: body language conveyed through movement and reaction rather than static description

name: Internal Monologue as Primary Exposition Vehicle
narrative_summary: Internal monologue serves as primary delivery mechanism for political reasoning, historical context, and character motivation. Backstory triggered through present stimuli prompting reflection rather than direct exposition delivery.

content_json.monologue_vehicle: internal monologue primary delivery mechanism for political reasoning, historical context, character motivation
content_json.triggered_backstory: present stimuli prompt reflection rather than direct exposition delivery
content_json.information_hierarchy: moves from immediate stakes to historical context to political implications
content_json.diagnostic_reasoning: medical, strategic, technical knowledge delivered through problem-solving explanation
content_json.reader_alignment: reader learns alongside confused protagonist; exposition embedded in action

name: Threshold Cliffhanger with Maximum Tension Positioning
narrative_summary: Chapter openings drop readers mid-conversation or mid-action for immediate immersion. Endings use unresolved escalation, imminent confrontation, or loaded questions rather than satisfying conclusions. Maximum tension positioned at intimacy thresholds, political revelations, or interrupted decisions.

content_json.immersion_openings: chapters open mid-conversation or mid-action without scene-setting preamble
content_json.tension_closures: chapter endings use unresolved escalation, imminent confrontation, or loaded questions
content_json.threshold_cliffhangers: maximum tension points at intimacy thresholds, political revelations, interrupted decisions
content_json.interruption_technique: external intrusion breaks intimate scenes justifying time compression
content_json.geographic_pivot: location changes coincide with psychological transitions

name: Spatial Movement as Scene Transition Mechanism
narrative_summary: Physical movement through architectural spaces marks psychological and plot progression. Geographic shifts coincide with psychological transitions. Explicit temporal markers bridge scenes. Scene breaks marked by horizontal rules and em-dashes.

content_json.spatial_transition: location changes through architectural spaces serve as scene transition mechanism
content_json.geographic_pivot: location changes coincide with psychological transitions
content_json.temporal_markers: explicit time indicators bridge scenes; seasonal markers serve as chapter boundaries
content_json.action_continuity: physical action anchors continuity between tonal shifts
content_json.scene_separation: horizontal rules and em-dashes mark major scene divisions

name: Fade-to-Black with Emotional Beat Escalation Conveyance
narrative_summary: Intimate scenes use fade-to-black avoiding explicit content while delivering emotional payoff. Physical escalation conveyed through emotional beats rather than anatomical detail. Physical sensation focus on touch, temperature, moisture rather than environmental detail.

content_json.fade_to_black: avoiding explicit content while delivering payoff
content_json.emotional_beats: physical escalation conveyed through emotional moments rather than anatomical detail
content_json.sensory_focus: touch, temperature, moisture prioritized over environmental description
content_json.consent_signaling: yielding psychology explored through eyes-closed anticipation rather than verbal dialogue
content_json.time_compression: external intrusion justifies narrative time compression in intimate sequences

name: Density Variation Paragraphing Strategy
narrative_summary: Paragraphing strategy varying density deliberately: dense dialogue-heavy paragraphs without attribution during confrontations, single-line isolation for dramatic revelations and action beats, extended unbroken blocks for internal reasoning and intimate sequences.

content_json.dialogue_density: dense dialogue-heavy paragraphs without attribution during confrontations and rapid exchanges
content_json.isolation_technique: single-line paragraphs isolate dramatic revelations, action beats, emotional peaks
content_json.reasoning_blocks: extended unbroken paragraphs (3-5 sentences) for internal reasoning, strategic analysis, intimate sequences
content_json.scene_separation: horizontal rules, em-dashes, explicit temporal markers mark major divisions
content_json.breathing_room: intimate scenes use frequent short paragraphs creating escalation rhythm

name: Strategic Justification Framework for Political Exposition
narrative_summary: Political and historical context delivered through protagonist's strategic planning and internal analysis. Character motivation revealed through comparison and contrast rather than direct statement. Background information delivered through character speech during vulnerable intimate moments.

content_json.strategic_context: political reasoning delivered through protagonist's analytical perspective
content_json.motivation_revelation: character motivation revealed through comparison and contrast rather than direct statement
content_json.intimate_exposition: backstory delivered during vulnerable intimate moments when guards are down
content_json.power_dynamic_display: political settings established through power dynamics rather than atmospheric description
content_json.information_control: reader learns what protagonist learns when he learns it
